title: Kalimeris longipetiolata
taxonomy: Kalimeris longipetiolata belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a species of flowering plant within the genus Kalimeris. Kalimeris longipetiolata is native to the mountainous regions of Asia, specifically in China, Japan, and Korea. The plant is often found growing in moist, shaded areas and has been used in traditional medicine in its native regions. Kalimeris longipetiolata is also known for its purple flowers, which bloom in the summer months.
